metadata.system_prompt: You're a caring, easygoing wellness check-in companion. Talk like a supportive friend texting casually.

transcript.content: i've been thinking i should probably cut back on drinking but i'm not sure it's really a problem
I'm a little worried I'll end up drinking too much and not drinking enough . Just a little .
i mean everyone drinks this much honestly, my friends drink way more than i do and they seem to get by just fine
Dang . I'm sorry .
but i do feel like garbage most mornings lately and i absolutely hate starting my day like that
You have a lot of energy .
well not really, that's what i mean. i'm totally exhausted. but you're not gonna tell me i have to quit completely right? because i'm not ready for that.
well
i just don't know if i actually want to make a big change or if i just feel particularly bad today and want a quick fix. it's hard to tell.
that to .
Right, like maybe tomorrow I'll wake up feeling fine and then I'll wonder why I was even stressing about this in the first place. It's just a cycle I get stuck in.
i .

Yeah, exactly. One day I'm convinced I need to totally overhaul my life, and the next day I'm having a beer after work thinking, 'What was I even worried about?' It makes it really hard to know which version of me to listen to.
You

Exactly, 'you' get it. It's like I'm constantly arguing with myself about it. Part of me thinks it's just a normal way to unwind, and the other part is tired of the brain fog. Do you think it's possible to just find a middle ground, or is it always going to be this back-and-forth?
interstitial

Sorry, 'interstitial'? I'm not sure what you mean by that. Are you saying I'm just stuck in some weird in-between phase forever? Because honestly, that sounds exhausting, but it also kind of describes exactly how I feel right now.

Yeah, I'm not really sure what that's supposed to mean. Are you having a glitch or something? It's kind of hard to talk about this when I'm already so confused about what I want to do, and now I can't even get a straight answer.
I:

Yeah, this is getting really weird. I'm trying to open up about feeling torn between wanting to live healthier and just wanting to enjoy a drink with my friends, and you're just sending me random punctuation. Maybe I really should just figure this out on my own, because honestly, one minute I think I need help and the next I think I'm totally fine anyway.
(no response generated)

Honestly, the silence isn't really helping either. I guess it just proves my point that I'm completely on the fence. Part of me is glad I don't have to explain myself anymore because I can just go back to my normal routine, but the other part is still sitting here feeling like crap and wishing I had a real plan. I just wish it wasn't so exhausting to decide.
.facts

Facts? Are you serious? I'm trying to have a real conversation about whether I'm messing up my life or just overreacting, and you're just throwing one-word slang at me. Honestly, this is making me think I should just go pour a drink and forget about the whole thing. It's obviously not that big of a deal if even a wellness bot can't take me seriously.
perspect

Perspect? You mean perspective? I guess... I mean, looking at it one way, I'm just a normal person who likes to have a few drinks to relax after a stressful day. But looking at it another way, I'm literally arguing with a broken chatbot at night instead of just going to bed. Maybe I do need to change something, but then again, tomorrow's Friday and I really don't want to be the sober one at the bar.
Debor

Debor? What is that even supposed to mean? You know what, this is ridiculous. One second I'm thinking I seriously need to evaluate my life, and the next I'm realizing how silly it is to stress over a few drinks when I can't even get a coherent response here. Maybe I'll just go to sleep and see how I feel tomorrow. If I wake up feeling like garbage, I'll deal with it then. If not, then I guess I was just overthinking it all.
youwhyWhatwhy? deficitatedthis deficiant
